name: research
description: v1.1.10 - Hardens R&D/preregistration report workflows and cache-safe plugin surfaces.

interface.shortDescription: Research and R&D protocols with quant finance specialization
interface.longDescription: v1.1.10 - Workstream-aware serious research and R&D workflows aligned to general R&D categories, pre-registration, plan-to-result comparison, report provenance, and cache-safe active skill surfaces. The plugin exposes a generic research skill for mixed research projects with local workstream gates, plus a quant-research adapter for financial machine learning, backtests, time-series validation, leakage checks, Sharpe/DSR review, transaction costs, and portfolio-oriented evidence.
